taxonomy.name: Neon & Glow
taxonomy.description: Tube/halo light effects built from stacked text-shadow or drop-shadow, static or flickering/pulsing.

taxonomy.name: Gradient Fill
taxonomy.description: Color piped through glyph shapes via background-clip:text, static or flowing/spinning/sweeping.

taxonomy.name: Metallic & Holographic
taxonomy.description: Specular chrome/gold/copper sheens and iridescent foil, often with @property hue spin or SVG warp.

taxonomy.name: 3D & Depth
taxonomy.description: Extrusion, isometric blocks, bevels, perspective tilts and per-letter 3D rotation.

taxonomy.name: Outline & Stroke
taxonomy.description: Hollow, multi-ring, gradient and self-drawing strokes via text-stroke or SVG dasharray.

taxonomy.name: Glitch & Distortion
taxonomy.description: Chromatic split, clip-slice tearing, jitter/warp, scanlines and SVG displacement.

taxonomy.name: Retro & Themed
taxonomy.description: Era/style packs: vaporwave, 80s chrome, arcade, comic, sticker, pixel, western, ransom, graffiti, candy.
exampleEffects: Sticker (white fill + colored stroke + hard shadow)

taxonomy.name: Shadow & Press
taxonomy.description: Drop/long/layered shadows plus letterpress, engrave, emboss and neumorphic relief.

taxonomy.name: Elemental & Nature
taxonomy.description: Fire, ice, water, lava, smoke, aurora, plasma, lightning and goo material simulations.
exampleEffects: Crystalline Ice Text (gradient + stroke + crystal shadow)

taxonomy.name: Fill & Texture
taxonomy.description: Glyphs filled with images, video, patterns, materials or animated textures via clip/mask/blend.

taxonomy.name: Entrance & Kinetic
taxonomy.description: On-load reveals and looping per-letter motion: fades, slides, staggers, waves, bounces, scramble.

taxonomy.name: Underline & Decoration
taxonomy.description: Animated/gradient/wavy underlines, highlighter sweeps, strikethroughs, reflections.

taxonomy.name: Interactive & Advanced
taxonomy.description: Pointer/scroll-driven, blend-mode background interaction, glass/lens refraction and showpiece SVG.
exampleEffects: Circular text on a path (SVG textPath)

v1MustHave: Filled + outline (solid fill with contrasting stroke)
Sticker (white fill + colored stroke + hard shadow)
v1Nice: Crystalline Ice Text (gradient + stroke + crystal shadow)
advanced: Background highlight reveal (scroll/hover wipe behind text)
RGB split / chromatic aberration (SVG filter, single element)
Circular text on a path (SVG textPath)
Text spinning around a circle (animated startOffset)
Wavy / sine-curve text following a path
Liquid drip + stretch goo (SVG gooey filter)
Liquid wave fill with surface foam (animated SVG wave)
Magnetic / gravity attract letters on hover

effects.name: Classic multi-layer neon tube text
effects.technique: Stack 6-8 comma-separated text-shadow values on a single element with the same offset (0 0) and progressively larger blur radii; the inner layers use white for the hot tube core and outer layers use the neon hue (e.g. #0fa) so brightness fades outward like real glass tube light.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Soft outer glow halo
effects.technique: A subtler version using only 2-3 text-shadow layers of a single hue with medium blur and no white core, giving an ambient diffuse halo around the glyphs rather than a hot neon tube.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Pulsing / breathing glow
effects.technique: Animate the text-shadow stack between two keyframes (0% small blur radii, 100% large blur radii) with animation-direction: alternate and infinite, so the glow rhythmically expands and contracts like breathing.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Broken neon flicker
effects.technique: @keyframes that hold the full text-shadow stack at most stops but set text-shadow:none (and dim color) at a few irregular percentages (e.g. 20%, 24%, 55%) to mimic a faulty, electrically stuttering neon sign; run infinite alternate.
effects.markupNote: single element (optionally per-letter spans for independent letter flicker)

effects.name: Per-letter staggered flicker
effects.technique: Wrap each character in a span and apply the flicker keyframes with different animation-delay / duration per letter (often via nth-child) so individual tubes blink out of sync, selling a worn vintage sign.
effects.markupNote: one <span> per letter

effects.name: Neon outline (transparent fill + glowing stroke)
effects.technique: Set color:transparent and -webkit-text-stroke with the neon hue to draw hollow glowing letters, then add a text-shadow stack of the same hue so only the stroked outline emits light (no filled core).
effects.markupNote: single element
effects.browserSupport: webkit-prefixed (text-stroke broadly supported but still prefixed)

effects.name: Dual-tone neon
effects.technique: Use two distinct hues in the text-shadow stack — one color for the inner/core layers and a contrasting color for the outer halo layers (e.g. magenta core bleeding into cyan halo) for a two-tone gas-tube look.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Color-cycling glow
effects.technique: Animate the hue of the glow over time, either by keyframing the text-shadow color through the spectrum or by using filter: hue-rotate() on the element so a single neon sign continuously shifts through colors.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Gradient glow text
effects.technique: Fill the text with a gradient via background:linear-gradient + background-clip:text + color:transparent, then apply the glow with filter: drop-shadow() on the element (not text-shadow, which the transparent fill would suppress) so the multicolor fill radiates a soft halo.
effects.markupNote: single element (drop-shadow on the clipped element)

effects.name: Animated gradient + glow shimmer
effects.technique: Gradient-clipped text (background-clip:text) with an oversized background-size animated via background-position keyframes so the gradient sweeps through the letters, combined with a drop-shadow glow for a liquid, shimmering neon look.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Glow-on-hover reveal
effects.technique: Base text has no/low glow; on :hover (or :focus) transition the text-shadow stack from none to a full neon stack with a CSS transition on text-shadow and color, so the sign 'powers on' when pointed at.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Neon framed sign (text + box glow)
effects.technique: Combine neon text-shadow on the text with a bordered container using box-shadow (outer hue glow plus inset hue glow) and border-radius, recreating a tube sign mounted in a glowing frame.
effects.markupNote: single element (text inside its own styled box)

effects.name: Electric / plasma glow (SVG turbulence)
effects.technique: Apply an inline SVG filter (feTurbulence generating Perlin noise + feDisplacementMap) to distort the glyph edges into crackling arcs, animate baseFrequency/seed, and stack a blurred glow layer (feGaussianBlur + feMerge or CSS drop-shadow) for a luminous electric halo.
effects.markupNote: inline <svg> filter def referenced by the text element
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter (all modern; animation of attrs varies)

effects.name: Layered halo glow (@property animated)
effects.technique: Register a custom @property (e.g. --glow as <length> or <color>) and animate it inside the text-shadow stack so the halo size/color tweens smoothly — something raw text-shadow keyframes interpolate less cleanly — for a controllable breathing halo.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Buzzing low-power flicker (opacity)
effects.technique: Instead of removing shadows, keyframe the element opacity between full and ~0.4 at rapid irregular intervals (e.g. 0%, 19.999%, 22%) so the whole glowing sign dims and brightens like an unstable transformer hum.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Static linear gradient text fill
effects.technique: Apply a linear-gradient to background-image, then background-clip:text (with -webkit- prefix) and -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent so the gradient shows only through the glyph shapes.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Radial / conic gradient text fill
effects.technique: Same clip recipe but the background-image is a radial-gradient (glow-from-center) or conic-gradient (color wheel sweep) instead of linear, giving a spotlight or pie-sweep fill inside the letters.
effects.markupNote: single element
effects.browserSupport: all modern (conic-gradient needs reasonably recent browsers)

effects.name: Animated gradient flow (background-position scroll)
effects.technique: Make the gradient larger than the text via background-size (e.g. 200-400%), then @keyframes animate background-position horizontally so the colors continuously slide through the clipped letters.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Animated conic gradient spin
effects.technique: Fill text with a conic-gradient whose start angle is a registered @property typed custom property (--angle as <angle>); @keyframes animate --angle 0deg to 360deg so the color wheel rotates inside the glyphs. A filter:hue-rotate animation is a simpler @property-free alternative.
effects.markupNote: single element
effects.browserSupport: needs @property for smooth angle interpolation (Chrome/Edge/Safari); hue-rotate fallback is all modern; not Firefox for @property angle in older versions

effects.name: Per-letter rainbow wave
effects.technique: Wrap each character in its own span and give each span a distinct hue (or staggered hue) gradient plus a phase-offset translateY/hue keyframe, producing a rolling rainbow wave across the word.
effects.markupNote: one <span> per letter (often generated)

effects.name: Smooth hue cycling via @property
effects.technique: Register a typed @property (e.g. --angle as <angle> or a --hue as <number>) and animate it in @keyframes; the gradient references it via hsl() or as its angle so the browser interpolates color/angle smoothly with sub-degree precision instead of stuttering string custom properties.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Gradient + glow combo (neon pulse)
effects.technique: Combine a scrolling linear-gradient text fill with an animated filter:drop-shadow (drop-shadow follows the alpha of clipped text, unlike text-shadow) that pulses in blur/color to create a glowing neon sign effect.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Multi-stop rainbow / holographic foil
effects.technique: Use a dense linear-gradient with 6-8+ saturated rainbow stops at a diagonal angle, optionally with background-size>100% and animated background-position for an iridescent holographic shift.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Duotone two-color gradient
effects.technique: A clean two-stop linear-gradient (one accent to another) clipped to text; can stay static or pair with a subtle letter-spacing or background-position animation for a branded duotone look.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Animated gradient text stroke (outline)
effects.technique: Apply -webkit-text-stroke to outline the glyphs while -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent hollows the fill, and use background-clip:text with a gradient (often @property-angle animated) so only the letter outlines carry a moving gradient.
effects.markupNote: single element (data-text duplicate optional for layered fill+stroke)
effects.browserSupport: webkit-prefixed (text-stroke is -webkit- only but broadly supported); smooth animation needs @property

effects.name: Mesh-like gradient fill
effects.technique: Layer several radial-gradient() blobs at different positions in one background-image over a base color, then clip to text so multiple soft colored hotspots blend like a mesh gradient inside the letters; positions can be animated for drift.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Gradient shimmer / metallic sheen sweep
effects.technique: Overlay a narrow bright band in a multi-stop linear-gradient (base color, then a tight white/light highlight stop, back to base) on an oversized background, and animate background-position so the highlight sweeps across the text like a reflective sheen.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Metallic chrome / gold gradient
effects.technique: A vertical multi-stop linear-gradient that mimics specular highlights (light, dark, light bands) clipped to text for a static chrome, gold, or copper metal look; pairs well with a thin text-stroke.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Lava / drifting radial hotspot
effects.technique: Fill text with a radial-gradient whose center position is driven by animated (registered @property for smoothness) custom properties, so a hot glowing blob slowly drifts inside the glyphs like molten lava.
effects.markupNote: single element
effects.browserSupport: needs @property for smooth position interpolation; degrades otherwise

effects.name: 3D extrude (stacked text-shadow)
effects.technique: A single comma-separated stack of many 0-blur text-shadow layers, each offset 1px further down-right (e.g. 1px 1px, 2px 2px, ... 8px 8px) with a progressively darker color, builds a solid extruded face beneath the text. Optionally a final blurred shadow grounds it.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: 3D text tower (stacked DOM elements)
effects.technique: The same word is duplicated as several absolutely-positioned stacked elements (or layered ::before/::after), each nudged 1px in Z-ish 2D offset and tinted darker, producing a chunky extrusion with crisp edges that a pure text-shadow stack cannot fully match; supports real 3D transforms on the whole stack.
effects.markupNote: duplicated text nodes or data-text driven ::before/::after layers

effects.name: Flat long shadow
effects.technique: A long, hard-edged 45-degree shadow is built from 30-100 comma-separated 0-blur text-shadow steps, each 1px further along x and y in a single flat color (often semi-transparent), so the shadow recedes far past the glyphs in trendy flat-design style.
effects.markupNote: single element (Sass/JS often generates the long list)

effects.name: Gradient long shadow
effects.technique: Same long stacked-text-shadow approach as flat long shadow, but each successive step interpolates color across a spectrum (or fades alpha via rgba), so the long shadow itself becomes a smooth gradient fading into the background.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Isometric block 3D
effects.technique: The text element is skewed to a true isometric ratio (transform: rotate(-45deg) skewX(15deg) skewY(15deg) or matrix(0.866,0.5,-0.866,0.5,0,0)), then a comma-separated text-shadow stack offset along the vertical axis paints the extruded side faces, giving a pixel-art isometric block look.
effects.markupNote: single element (a ::after can hold a standing copy of the text)

effects.name: Retro layered 3D (two-color)
effects.technique: Two or three offset solid-color text-shadow layers (e.g. pink + cyan + dark) at a small fixed offset over bold light text recreate the 80s/arcade misregistered-print 3D look; no blur, distinct flat color bands.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Retro 3D headline on perspective grid
effects.technique: A retro layered/gradient-filled headline (gradient via background-clip: text) is combined with a transform: perspective(...) rotateX(...) tilt so the chrome-style text leans back over a synthwave horizon, often paired with an extrude text-shadow for thickness.
effects.markupNote: single element (grid background is a separate decorative element)

effects.name: 3D perspective tilt (CSS transform)
effects.technique: perspective on the container plus transform: rotateX()/rotateY()/rotateZ() on the heading tilts the whole word into 3D space; transform-style: preserve-3d keeps any extrude layers consistent in that perspective.
effects.markupNote: single element (perspective ideally on a wrapper)

effects.name: 3D rotate/flip per letter
effects.technique: Each letter is wrapped in a span; perspective on the parent plus a keyframe animation that rotates each span on rotateX or rotateY, staggered by animation-delay per letter, makes letters flip/tumble in 3D one after another (a wave).
effects.markupNote: one span per character (delay set via inline style or nth-child)

effects.name: Rotating 3D cube text
effects.technique: Each letter (or the word) is a preserve-3d cube whose 6 faces are positioned with rotateX/rotateY + translateZ(half-size); a @keyframes rotateX/rotateY animation on the cube spins it so different text faces come forward, optionally staggered per letter.
effects.markupNote: nested cube markup (6 face elements) per letter/word

effects.name: Pop-out 3D (translateZ layers)
effects.technique: Within a preserve-3d, perspective container, copies of the text (via stacked elements or ::before/::after with data-text) are pushed forward at different translateZ depths, so the word physically pops off the page toward the viewer with real parallax when the scene tilts.
effects.markupNote: data-text driven ::before/::after or duplicated layers

effects.name: Beveled 3D
effects.technique: Two opposing 1-2px text-shadows (a light highlight offset up-left and a dark shadow offset down-right, e.g. -1px -1px #fff, 1px 1px #000) simulate a beveled/chiseled edge; reversing the offsets produces the inset/debossed (pressed-in) variant.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Floating 3D with drop shadow
effects.technique: A subtle extrude or bevel gives the glyphs body, while a large soft, often layered drop-shadow (filter: drop-shadow() or a big blurred text-shadow offset down) sits well below the text, making it read as floating above the surface with elevation.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: 3D depth on hover
effects.technique: Default state is flat or shallow; on :hover a transition animates an extrude text-shadow stack from short to long (and/or a translate offset) so the text appears to lift/grow depth, often combined with a slight transform: translate to reinforce the rise.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Interactive 3D tilt on hover (perspective parallax)
effects.technique: A perspective + preserve-3d wrapper holds the word; on :hover (or via mouse-tracked CSS custom props) the heading applies transform: rotateX()/rotateY(), and translateZ pop-out layers shift, producing a tilting card-like parallax of the text toward the cursor.
effects.markupNote: wrapper + text layers (pure :hover is single-axis; cursor tracking needs custom props/minimal JS)
effects.browserSupport: needs @property (for animated angle vars); core works all modern

effects.name: Hollow outline text (transparent fill stroke)
effects.technique: Set color/-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent and apply -webkit-text-stroke (width + color) so only the letterform outline renders with an empty interior.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Filled + outline (solid fill with contrasting stroke)
effects.technique: Keep a solid -webkit-text-fill-color (or color) and add -webkit-text-stroke in a contrasting color so the letters are filled and bordered simultaneously; stroke sits on top of and inside the glyph edge.
effects.markupNote: single element; paint-order: stroke fill helps keep fill area crisp

effects.name: Text-shadow four-corner outline
effects.technique: Stack four (or eight) hard text-shadow copies offset by +/-1px on each axis with zero blur to fake a stroke around solid-colored text, avoiding -webkit-text-stroke entirely.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Drop-shadow filter outline
effects.technique: Apply filter: drop-shadow() multiple times (one per direction, near-zero blur) to the element; unlike text-shadow this also outlines gradient-clipped or transparent-fill text since it traces rendered alpha.
effects.markupNote: single element; works on gradient-filled text where text-shadow fails

effects.name: Offset echo / 3D extruded outline
effects.technique: Combine transparent-fill -webkit-text-stroke with a long series of incrementally shifted hard text-shadow layers (1px,2px,3px...) in a darker tone to build a solid extruded body trailing behind a hollow outlined front face.
effects.markupNote: single element
effects.browserSupport: webkit-prefixed for stroke; rest all modern

effects.name: Double / triple layered outline
effects.technique: Layer concentric outlines by stacking text-shadow rings at increasing zero-blur offsets in alternating colors (e.g. white at 2px, black at 4px) around a transparent or filled core to create nested borders.
effects.markupNote: single element; can combine an inner -webkit-text-stroke with outer shadow rings

effects.name: Dashed / dotted outline text
effects.technique: Render text as inline SVG <text> with fill: none, stroke, and stroke-dasharray (e.g. '8 6' for dashes or '1 6' with round linecaps for dots) to draw a broken outline CSS text-stroke cannot produce.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG with <text> element; dash/dot pattern set via stroke-dasharray

effects.name: Draw-on (self-writing) stroke animation
effects.technique: On inline SVG <text fill=none stroke=...>, set stroke-dasharray equal to the path length and animate stroke-dashoffset from that length to 0 so the outline appears to draw itself like handwriting.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <text>; dasharray/offset sized to glyph perimeter (measured via getTotalLength or large fixed value)

effects.name: Gradient stroke (gradient-colored outline)
effects.technique: Layer a transparent-fill -webkit-text-stroke element over (or under) a sibling/pseudo with background: linear-gradient + background-clip: text, OR use inline SVG <text> with a linearGradient/pattern applied to the stroke attribute.
effects.markupNote: duplicate via data-text pseudo-element to layer gradient-fill behind transparent stroke, OR single inline SVG with gradient-stroked <text>

effects.name: Animated flowing gradient stroke
effects.technique: Apply gradient stroke via SVG/clip-text and animate it: register an @property <angle> and animate the linear/conic-gradient angle, or animate background-position of an oversized gradient, so the outline's colors continuously flow.
effects.markupNote: data-text pseudo-element layering, or inline SVG gradient stroke with animated stops
effects.browserSupport: needs @property for angle interpolation; webkit clip-text

effects.name: Glowing outline (soft halo stroke)
effects.technique: Take a transparent-fill -webkit-text-stroke outline and add several blurred text-shadow layers in the stroke color (increasing blur radius) so the hollow outline emits a soft colored glow around the letterforms.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Neon outline tube
effects.technique: Transparent-fill text with a thin bright -webkit-text-stroke plus two tiers of stacked text-shadow (tight white core + wide colored halos) to mimic a glowing neon glass tube; optional flicker @keyframes toggling shadow sets.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Partial-fill outline (liquid/level fill)
effects.technique: Layer a transparent-fill stroked outline with a duplicate that has a hard-stop linear-gradient (or clip) fill; animate the gradient stop / background-position or clip so solid color fills the hollow letters up to a movable level.
effects.markupNote: data-text pseudo-element or stacked duplicate: one transparent stroke, one gradient-clipped fill

effects.name: Marching-ants animated outline trace
effects.technique: Inline SVG <text fill=none stroke=...> with a fixed stroke-dasharray dash pattern, then animate stroke-dashoffset continuously so the dashes march around the glyph perimeter (full outline stays visible).
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <text>

effects.name: Pulsing / breathing outline
effects.technique: Animate the stroke itself by keyframing -webkit-text-stroke-width (and/or a blurred glow text-shadow's blur radius) between thin and thick so the hollow outline rhythmically expands and contracts.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Outline-to-fill transition on hover
effects.technique: Start with transparent-fill + -webkit-text-stroke (hollow), then on :hover transition -webkit-text-fill-color from transparent to a solid color (optionally with a clip/gradient wipe) so the outline fills in.
effects.markupNote: single element (data-text pseudo only if directional wipe fill is desired)
effects.browserSupport: webkit-prefixed (fill-color transitions; transparent->color needs explicit color)

effects.name: Chrome / silver gradient text
effects.technique: A vertical multi-stop linear-gradient alternating dark grays (#777/#999) and near-whites (#fff/#e8e8e8) is clipped to the glyphs with background-clip:text and -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent, with stops banded to fake specular highlights.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Gold gradient text (classic foil)
effects.technique: Warm linear-gradient(to bottom, #cfc09f 27%, #ffecb3 40%, #3a2c0f 78%) clipped to text; the bright midtone band reads as the gold sheen and the dark low stop as the shadowed bottom edge.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Rose-gold / copper gradient text
effects.technique: Same clip-gradient recipe but with a pink-bronze palette (copper #cb6d51 / rose-gold #b76e78 through blush #f6dfe1 highlights), keeping stops within one hue family for a believable brushed-copper tone.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Metallic gradient + 3D drop-shadow
effects.technique: A clipped metallic gradient on the front layer plus a stacked text-shadow (tight light shadow for a raised lip, plus offset dark blurred shadows) plus an optional aria-hidden duplicate text layer behind for solid drop depth.
effects.markupNote: optional duplicate aria-hidden text behind for solid drop shadow; works single-element with text-shadow only

effects.name: Brushed metal text
effects.technique: A repeating-linear-gradient of fine alternating light/dark bands (sub-pixel to ~2px) is clipped to the text to simulate horizontal brushing grain, usually layered over a base metallic linear-gradient.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Shimmer light-sweep across text
effects.technique: A dark-base linear-gradient with a bright highlight band, background-size ~200%, clipped to text; @keyframes animates background-position from one side to the other so the light streak slides across the letters.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Glint on hover
effects.technique: A skewed (skewX(-25deg)) ::before pseudo-element with a transparent-white-transparent linear-gradient sits off-screen; on :hover a transform/translateX transition sweeps it across the text, with overflow:hidden clipping it to the bounds.
effects.markupNote: single element (pseudo-element provides the streak); wrapper recommended for overflow clipping

effects.name: Iridescent / holographic foil text
effects.technique: Multiple stacked gradients (a directional linear plus a conic rainbow, optionally a radial sheen) clipped to text; oversized background-size with animated background-position creates a slow prismatic shift, ideally in OKLCH for smooth hue travel.
effects.markupNote: single element
effects.browserSupport: all modern (conic widely supported; oklch needs recent browsers)

effects.name: Oil-slick text
effects.technique: A high-saturation conic or multi-hue gradient (magenta/cyan/violet/green) clipped to text and combined via blend modes (difference/color-dodge) over a dark base to mimic thin-film interference, giving the petrol/soap-bubble look.
effects.markupNote: single element (or a layered pseudo-element for the blend pass)

effects.name: Animated hue-spin metallic (@property)
effects.technique: A custom property registered with @property as <angle> (or a registered hue number) drives a conic-gradient's from-angle or a hue-rotate; because the property is typed, @keyframes can smoothly interpolate it, spinning the metallic sheen.
effects.markupNote: single element (requires @property at-rule in stylesheet)

effects.name: Pointer-reactive holographic foil
effects.technique: CSS custom properties (--mx/--my) fed from pointer position shift the position/angle of a clipped conic+linear holographic gradient and an overlaid glare layer (mix-blend-mode), so tilting/moving the cursor reveals the foil shimmer.
effects.markupNote: wrapper plus a glare/foil overlay pseudo-element; pointer vars typically set via a tiny inline handler or CSS-only :hover approximation
effects.browserSupport: all modern; smoothest pointer tracking with @property-registered vars

effects.name: Liquid metal text
effects.technique: An inline SVG filter chains feTurbulence (fractalNoise) into feDisplacementMap to warp a chrome-gradient-clipped text, optionally with feSpecularLighting for molten highlights; animating the turbulence baseFrequency/seed makes the metal flow.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG filter def referenced via filter:url(#id)
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter (all modern; animating SVG attrs may need SMIL or CSS var driving baseFrequency)

effects.name: Foil with animated highlight bar
effects.technique: A static metallic/foil gradient clipped to text plus a separate narrow, near-opaque white highlight band (sharper and tighter than shimmer) that travels across via animated background-position on a second clipped layer, reading as a hard glint streak.
effects.markupNote: single element (second background layer for the streak)

effects.name: Flowing metallic gradient
effects.technique: A multi-stop diagonal metallic gradient with oversized background-size is clipped to text and its background-position is animated in a slow continuous loop, so highlights and shadows drift across the whole word like rotating polished metal.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: RGB / chromatic split glitch
effects.technique: Two ::before/::after copies of the text (filled from a data-text attr) are absolutely stacked over the original and tinted cyan and magenta/red via color or text-shadow, then offset on the x-axis so the color channels fringe apart. Often combined with mix-blend-mode: screen so overlapping channels recombine to white.
effects.markupNote: Single element but needs a data-text attribute duplicating the text so the two pseudo-elements can render it

effects.name: Slice / clip-path glitch (classic glitch)
effects.technique: The two color-split pseudo-element copies are animated with @keyframes that rapidly change clip-path: inset(top right bottom left) to reveal different horizontal bands at each step, while translating each band horizontally — producing the torn, sliced, jittering glitch. The two layers use desynchronized durations so they never align.
effects.markupNote: data-text attribute for the two clipped pseudo-element layers

effects.name: Shake / jitter glitch
effects.technique: A single element is nudged with @keyframes that apply small randomized transform: translate(x,y) (and sometimes tiny skew) values, driven by animation-timing-function: steps() so the motion snaps rather than eases, giving a vibrating/jittery digital tremor.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Skew / warp distortion
effects.technique: @keyframes interpolate transform: skewX()/skewY() (optionally with scaleY and translate) between extreme values held for a few frames via steps(), shearing the text into a leaning, melting warp that snaps back — reads as signal warping.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Scanline glitch jitter (CRT)
effects.technique: An overlay (the element's ::after with pointer-events: none) is filled with a repeating-linear-gradient of transparent and semi-dark 2px stripes to fake CRT scanlines, then animated by translating the gradient's background-position vertically so the lines roll/jitter over the text.
effects.markupNote: single element (scanlines drawn on a pseudo-element overlay)

effects.name: Flicker glitch
effects.technique: @keyframes vary opacity (and often text-shadow glow) between full and slightly dimmed values at irregular keyframe stops, using steps() or abrupt jumps to mimic an unstable, flickering neon/CRT signal. Frequently layered onto other glitch effects.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: VHS distortion (tracking/chroma bleed)
effects.technique: Combines a soft chromatic-split text-shadow (red/blue offsets) with a scanline overlay and a periodic horizontal tracking-error band: @keyframes translate the text and a clip-path band sideways while bumping a blur/saturate filter, emulating worn-tape chroma bleed and tracking wobble.
effects.markupNote: single element (overlay + shadows on pseudo-elements); data-text optional if a clipped duplicate band is used

effects.name: Digital noise glitch (static)
effects.technique: An inline SVG feTurbulence (type=fractalNoise, high baseFrequency) generates static noise rendered as a background-image on a pseudo-element overlay clipped to the text (via background-clip: text or mix-blend-mode), with @keyframes shifting the noise seed/position so grainy static crawls across the glyphs.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> with feTurbulence (or a data-URI SVG) plus an overlay element

effects.name: Wave / ripple distortion (SVG displacement)
effects.technique: An inline SVG filter pairs feTurbulence (low baseFrequency) with feDisplacementMap (scale + xChannelSelector/yChannelSelector) and is applied to the text via CSS filter: url(#id). The turbulence map physically shoves the glyph pixels, producing organic wavy/liquid warps impossible with transforms. Animating baseFrequency or scale makes the ripple flow.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> defs with feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap referenced by the text

effects.name: Datamosh / pixel-smear glitch
effects.technique: Like the ripple but tuned for compression-artifact look: feTurbulence with type=turbulence feeds feDisplacementMap at a large scale, optionally chained with feColorMatrix to skew hues, smearing blocks of the text sideways. Animating the turbulence seed in bursts gives the intermittent datamosh tear.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> defs (turbulence + displacement + optional color matrix)

effects.name: Text corruption / scramble (CSS-only)
effects.technique: Each character is wrapped in a span carrying its real glyph in a data attr and random replacement glyphs in custom properties; the span's ::after content is animated through @keyframes that swap content: var(--char-n), staggered per character via calc(index * delay), so the word cycles garbage characters before resolving.
effects.markupNote: per-letter spans with data-char and --char-* custom properties (e.g. via Splitting.js markup)

effects.name: Block / box reveal glitch
effects.technique: A solid-colored ::before block (or clip-path rectangle) sweeps across the text in stepped @keyframes, momentarily masking and revealing chunks while the text underneath is x-shifted — giving a censor-bar/data-block glitch as bands of the word blink in and out.
effects.markupNote: single element (block drawn on a pseudo-element)

effects.name: Hue-shift / channel-corrupt glitch
effects.technique: filter: hue-rotate() / saturate() / invert() are pulsed in stepped @keyframes (optionally on color-split pseudo-elements) so the text's color channels lurch and invert intermittently, reading as a corrupted-signal color glitch without any positional movement.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Per-letter wave warp (vertical jitter)
effects.technique: Each letter is a span with a custom-property index; @keyframes apply transform: translateY/rotate offset by animation-delay: calc(index * step), so letters undulate out of phase into a flowing wave or chaotic vertical jitter (corruption when randomized).
effects.markupNote: one span per character, each with an --i index custom property

effects.name: Glow / bloom flicker glitch
effects.technique: Layered text-shadow halos (and optional drop-shadow filter) are pulsed in irregular @keyframes, dimming and re-igniting the bloom in sync with an opacity flicker to mimic a buzzing neon/hologram sign losing power. Pairs naturally with the RGB-split layers.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Vaporwave/synthwave gradient title
effects.technique: Pink-to-cyan/purple linear-gradient clipped to glyphs via background-clip:text + color:transparent, layered with multi-color text-shadow neon glow; an optional perspective grid floor drawn behind with repeating-linear-gradient on a transform:rotateX pseudo-element.
effects.markupNote: single element for the text; grid floor is an optional decorative pseudo-element (::after)

effects.name: 80s chrome / metallic text
effects.technique: Vertical multi-stop linear-gradient (dark blue -> near-white -> hard black band -> light blue) clipped to text with background-clip:text to fake specular chrome reflection, finished with a -webkit-text-stroke edge and a contrasting drop text-shadow.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Arcade neon flicker
effects.technique: Bright fill plus stacked layered text-shadow halos (small sharp to large blurred, same hue) for the neon tube; a @keyframes flicker toggles opacity and shadow on/off at irregular percentages to mimic a failing tube, optionally per-letter via animation-delay.
effects.markupNote: single element; per-letter flicker needs spans with staggered delays

effects.name: Comic 3D outline pop
effects.technique: Bold display font with a 4-direction zero-blur text-shadow outline around white fill, then a long chain of progressively offset solid-color shadows to extrude a thick comic-book drop, capped with one blurred soft shadow for ground contact.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Sticker (white fill + colored stroke + hard shadow)
effects.technique: White fill with a thick contrasting -webkit-text-stroke (or text-shadow-simulated outline), plus a single hard offset drop-shadow with no blur; often wrapped on an inline-block with white padding/border-radius and a filter:drop-shadow for the die-cut sticker border.
effects.markupNote: single element (paint-order:stroke fill keeps stroke behind for clean sticker edge)

effects.name: Pixel / 8-bit blocky text
effects.technique: Pixel/bitmap font with -webkit-font-smoothing:none and image-rendering:pixelated to kill anti-aliasing, plus a hard offset zero-blur text-shadow (or stacked box-shadow) to fake a chunky 1-bit drop shadow; scale up with transform to keep crisp square edges.
effects.markupNote: single element (requires a pixel webfont)

effects.name: Western / wood saloon text
effects.technique: Slab-serif/Western display font filled with a wood-grain via an SVG feTurbulence(fractalNoise) texture (background-clip:text) or a layered linear/repeating-linear-gradient of browns, edged with a dark -webkit-text-stroke and a beveled multi-step text-shadow for carved-plank depth.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG filter def for the wood-grain noise referenced by filter/background; or gradient-only variant is single element

effects.name: Ransom note
effects.technique: Each letter wrapped in a span and given a random-looking background color, font-family, padding, and a small transform:rotate via :nth-child cycling (or CSS random()), so glyphs look like cut-out magazine clippings pasted at angles.
effects.markupNote: one span per letter (each clipping styled individually)
effects.browserSupport: all modern (CSS random() needs newest browsers; nth-child fallback is universal)

effects.name: Graffiti spray-paint text
effects.technique: Display/bubble font passed through an SVG filter combining feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap to roughen and break up the edges into spray speckle, layered with a soft colored text-shadow for the spray haze and a thick stroke for the bubble outline.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> def referenced via CSS filter:url(#id)

effects.name: Chalkboard chalk text
effects.technique: Handwritten font in chalk-white on a dark green/black board background, roughened by an SVG feTurbulence noise filter (or a noisy mask) to scrub out portions of the strokes for a dusty look, with a faint low-opacity text-shadow for chalk smudge.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG filter/mask def for the grainy chalk texture; gradient-noise-only variant can be single element

effects.name: Candy cane striped text
effects.technique: Diagonal repeating-linear-gradient of red/white stripes clipped to the glyphs with background-clip:text, combined with a stacked beveled text-shadow (light top highlight + dark bottom) to give the candy a glossy 3D rounded surface.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Glossy candy / jelly text
effects.technique: Saturated radial/linear-gradient fill clipped to text plus a top white blurred text-shadow highlight and a colored lower glow, giving a wet, translucent hard-candy sheen; thick rounded stroke optional.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Balloon / inflated puffy text
effects.technique: Rounded heavy font with an off-center radial-gradient fill (light highlight upper-left to saturated edge) clipped to glyphs to fake a glossy 3D balloon surface, a soft outer text-shadow/drop-shadow for lift, and a thick rounded stroke; an optional scale/translate keyframe makes it gently inflate.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Synthwave grid-fill text (scanline)
effects.technique: Text filled with a horizontal repeating-linear-gradient (thin neon lines over transparent) via background-clip:text to read as a CRT/grid-scan fill, animated by shifting background-position for a scrolling scanline, plus a magenta/cyan glow text-shadow.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Cartoon bubble outline (multi-stroke)
effects.technique: Layered duplicate text via data-text pseudo-elements (or paint-order) building several concentric outlines of increasing width and alternating colors, producing a thick cartoon double/triple bubble outline around the fill.
effects.markupNote: data-text attribute mirrors the text for pseudo-element outline layers

effects.name: Basic drop shadow
effects.technique: A single text-shadow with x/y offset, a moderate blur radius, and a semi-transparent dark color to lift the text off the background.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Hard offset shadow (flat retro)
effects.technique: A single text-shadow with a visible x/y offset and zero blur, producing a crisp solid-colored shadow offset block behind the letters for a flat/sticker look.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Blurred soft glow shadow
effects.technique: A single text-shadow (or filter: drop-shadow) with little/no offset and a large blur radius in a light or accent color, giving a soft diffuse halo/glow around the text.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Layered multi-shadow depth
effects.technique: A comma-separated stack of several text-shadows at increasing offsets and varying blur/opacity, rendered front-to-back to build a soft compounding depth that a single shadow cannot.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Letterpress (light-from-above)
effects.technique: Text colored slightly darker than the background with a single subtle white/light text-shadow offset downward (0 1px), so the highlight below the glyph fakes a pressed-in look.
effects.markupNote: single element (works best on a colored, non-white background)

effects.name: Engraved text (carved-in)
effects.technique: On a dark/mid background, combine a dark shadow offset upward (0 -1px) with a light shadow offset downward (0 1px) so the top edge is shaded and the bottom edge is lit, faking a recessed groove.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Embossed text (raised relief)
effects.technique: Inverse of engraved: a light highlight shadow offset upward and a darker shadow offset downward, with text color close to background, so glyphs appear to bulge out of the surface.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Neumorphic soft text
effects.technique: Text whose color matches a soft pastel-grey background, with two opposing soft text-shadows (a light one top-left, a dark one bottom-right at large blur) to simulate the pillowy extruded soft-UI look.
effects.markupNote: single element (requires a neutral pastel/grey background to read)

effects.name: Inset shadow via background-clip
effects.technique: Set a fill background on the element, color: transparent with background-clip: text, plus a light text-shadow; the blurred shadow gets clipped to the glyph outline, faking an inner/inset shadow that pure text-shadow cannot do.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Colored / rainbow stacked shadow
effects.technique: Multiple hard-edged (0 blur) text-shadows each at an incrementing offset and a different hue, stacking spectral bands behind the text for a colorful radiating trail.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Long solid shadow (45 degrees)
effects.technique: A long comma-separated chain of zero-blur text-shadows, each stepped +1px in x and y, all in one solid color, to extrude a continuous flat long shadow off the text.
effects.markupNote: single element (long shadow list usually preprocessor-generated)

effects.name: Long colored gradient shadow
effects.technique: Same stepped 1px text-shadow chain as a long shadow, but each successive shadow shifts color/opacity so the extrusion fades from a saturated hue near the text to a lighter tone blending into the background.
effects.markupNote: single element (graded shadow list typically generated by Sass/JS)

effects.name: Retro 3D extruded shadow
effects.technique: A handful of zero-blur text-shadows at uniform increasing diagonal offsets in graduated shades of one color, producing a bold chunky extruded 3D block beneath the type.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Gradient-fill text with drop shadow
effects.technique: A gradient is clipped to text via background-clip: text with transparent fill, and because text-shadow would sit above transparent glyphs, the shadow is applied with filter: drop-shadow() on the element (or a wrapper) so it conforms to the glyph alpha.
effects.markupNote: single element (wrapper sometimes used so drop-shadow applies cleanly)

effects.name: Animated press / pulsing depth
effects.technique: Keyframes animate the offset and blur of paired emboss/letterpress text-shadows (and optionally translate) so the text appears to press in and pop back out on a loop or on hover.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: SVG bevel/emboss filter text
effects.technique: An inline SVG filter chains feGaussianBlur + feOffset + feSpecularLighting (with fePointLight) + feComposite (or feConvolveMatrix) to compute true beveled/embossed lighting on the alpha of the text, then applied via filter:url(#id).
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> definition referenced by filter: url(#id)

effects.name: Flickering Fire Text (layered text-shadow)
effects.technique: Stacks multiple text-shadows from white/yellow (hottest) through orange to deep red, then animates the shadow blur radii and slight vertical offsets in @keyframes to make the flame lick and flicker.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Gradient Fire Fill with Glow
effects.technique: Fills the glyphs with a vertical fire linear-gradient via background-clip:text + transparent fill, then layers an animated orange drop-shadow/text-shadow glow that pulses, giving a hot gradient body plus radiated heat.
effects.markupNote: single element (gradient + glow on one node)

effects.name: Turbulent Flame Edges (SVG feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap)
effects.technique: Applies an inline SVG filter combining animated feTurbulence (fractal noise) feeding feDisplacementMap to warp the letter edges, over a fire gradient/glow, so the outline writhes like real flame rather than just glowing.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> def referenced by filter: url(#flame)
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter (Chrome/Firefox; Safari spotty on DOM text)

effects.name: Molten Lava Glyphs (drifting radial hotspot)
effects.technique: Clips a dark-crust-to-glowing-orange radial gradient into the text; an @property-typed position/angle custom property animates the radial hotspot so molten light slowly drifts through the letters, paired with a warm outer glow.
effects.markupNote: single element (animated gradient position)
effects.browserSupport: needs @property (Chrome/Edge/Safari 16.4+, not Firefox); fallback to background-position

effects.name: Crystalline Ice Text (gradient + stroke + crystal shadow)
effects.technique: Clips a pale blue-white ice gradient/texture into the glyphs, adds a darker -webkit-text-stroke for definition, and layers several light drop-shadows (with offset + blur/standard-deviation) to fake crystalline depth and a cold glow.
effects.markupNote: single element (static); animated shine adds one aria-hidden span

effects.name: Frosted Ice with Moving Shine
effects.technique: Builds on crystalline ice but overlays a duplicate aria-hidden span filled with a bright diagonal linear-gradient whose background-position animates across the letters, creating a sweeping light reflection over the frozen surface.
effects.markupNote: duplicate aria-hidden <span> stacked over the base text for the shine layer

effects.name: Frozen Text with Hanging Icicles
effects.technique: Ice-styled gradient glyphs with a ::after pseudo-element along the bottom whose lower edge is carved by a clip-path/SVG path or repeating radial-gradient to form dripping icicle spikes; icicles can grow via animated clip-path.
effects.markupNote: single element using ::after for icicle row (data-text optional)
effects.browserSupport: all modern (clip-path); webkit for text fill

effects.name: Water-Fill Rising Wave Text
effects.technique: Transparent background-clip:text glyphs reveal a wave background built from layered radial/linear gradients (or an SVG wave); one @keyframes scrolls the wave horizontally while another raises the fill level via background-position/clip-path so water appears to fill the letters.
effects.markupNote: single element (wave is a CSS gradient background)

effects.name: Liquid Refraction Text (SVG displacement)
effects.technique: A blue gradient-filled text gets an inline SVG filter where animated feTurbulence drives feDisplacementMap to ripple/refract the glyph edges like water surface distortion, optionally with a subtle blur for the liquid sheen.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> def referenced via filter: url(#ripple)
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter (Chrome/Firefox; Safari unreliable on DOM)

effects.name: Melting / Dripping Goo Text
effects.technique: Wraps text and pseudo-element 'drips' in a container with the goo SVG filter (feGaussianBlur then feColorMatrix alpha-contrast to re-sharpen merged blobs); animated ::after droplets translate downward and merge into the letters so the type appears to melt and drip.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG goo <filter> def + drip pseudo-elements/spans inside a filtered wrapper
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter; feColorMatrix goo not honored in Safari/older Firefox (degrades to blur)

effects.name: Clip-Path Drip Text
effects.technique: A ::after copy of the text (or a colored bar) below the baseline is masked with a clip-path polygon shaped like hanging drips, and the polygon points animate to stretch the drips downward without any SVG filter.
effects.markupNote: single element using ::after (data-text helpful for copying text)

effects.name: Smoke Dissolve / Drift Text
effects.technique: Per-letter spans each animate from filter:blur(0) + opacity:1 to a large blur with translate/rotate/scale drift and opacity:0 on staggered delays, so letters dissolve and waft away like rising smoke; optional feTurbulence adds wispy texture.
effects.markupNote: one <span> per letter for staggered drift (single element only for a whole-word fade)
effects.browserSupport: all modern (blur/transform); SVG filter if turbulence added

effects.name: Foggy Backlit Text
effects.technique: Soft low-contrast text sits over slowly drifting, heavily blurred gradient fog layers (pseudo-elements with filter:blur translating sideways), giving a misty, atmospheric haze rolling across the type.
effects.markupNote: single element using blurred pseudo-element fog layers

effects.name: Gooey Blob Morph Text
effects.technique: Letters/blobs inside a wrapper carrying the classic goo filter (feGaussianBlur stdDeviation + feColorMatrix values='... 0 0 0 18 -7' to clamp alpha) bleed into and pinch off from each other as they scale/translate, producing surface-tension gooey morphing.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG goo <filter> def + blob/letter elements inside the filtered container
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter; feColorMatrix goo unsupported in Safari/older Firefox (renders plain blur)

effects.name: Aurora Borealis Gradient Text
effects.technique: Clips a multi-stop teal/violet/emerald gradient (or stacked blurred radial gradient 'mesh') into the glyphs and animates background-position so northern-lights bands of color sweep slowly through the text.
effects.markupNote: single element (stacked gradient layers, optional blurred pseudo-element)

effects.name: Plasma Energy Text (@property hue + conic)
effects.technique: Fills text with layered conic/radial gradients and animates an @property-typed --angle plus a filter:hue-rotate cycle so an electric, ever-shifting plasma of color churns inside the letters, with a soft blurred glow underneath.
effects.markupNote: single element (animated gradient + hue-rotate)
effects.browserSupport: needs @property for smooth angle (not Firefox); hue-rotate all modern; webkit for text clip

effects.name: Neon Electric Glow Text
effects.technique: Layers tight bright-core text-shadows with wider colored halo shadows for a neon tube glow, then a flicker @keyframes briefly drops opacity and removes shadow on staggered timing to mimic an unstable electric discharge.
effects.markupNote: single element (per-letter spans only for individual-letter flicker)

effects.name: Lightning Arc / Jitter Text
effects.technique: Electric-blue glow text whose edges are distorted by an inline SVG feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap jittering at high baseFrequency, combined with rapid random-feeling text-shadow flashes, so jagged lightning-like arcs crackle around the glyphs.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> def referenced via filter: url(#lightning)
effects.browserSupport: SVG filter (Chrome/Firefox; Safari unreliable on DOM text)

effects.name: Image-filled text (background-clip)
effects.technique: Set a raster background-image on the heading, then -webkit-background-clip:text / background-clip:text with -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent so the photo only paints inside the glyph shapes.
effects.markupNote: single element (add a solid fallback background-color for when the image fails)
effects.browserSupport: all modern (webkit-prefixed for older Chrome/Edge; unprefixed Chrome/Edge 120+)

effects.name: Video-filled (knockout) text
effects.technique: Layer transparent/knockout text over a looping <video>: either put white text with mix-blend-mode:multiply (or black text with screen) on a white/black overlay above the video, or use an SVG window-mask so the letters are cut as holes through a solid panel revealing the video behind.
effects.markupNote: a <video> element plus an overlay/text element (or inline SVG <mask>/<clipPath>); cannot be done with one node since background-clip:text can't take a live video
effects.browserSupport: all modern (mix-blend-mode broadly supported; SVG-mask route most reliable)

effects.name: Animated gradient shimmer fill
effects.technique: Clip a linear-gradient with a bright highlight band to the text (background-clip:text), set background-size:200% 100%, and @keyframes-animate background-position from one side to the other so a sheen sweeps across the letters.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Rotating conic-gradient hue-cycle fill
effects.technique: Register an angle (and/or hue) with @property as <angle>/<number>, build a conic-gradient (or hsl()-driven gradient) clipped to text, then animate the registered custom property 0->360deg so colors rotate/cycle smoothly inside the glyphs.
effects.markupNote: single element (needs @property at-rule in stylesheet)
effects.browserSupport: needs @property (Chrome/Edge/Safari; not Firefox as of 2025 — falls back to static gradient)

effects.name: Striped pattern fill
effects.technique: Use repeating-linear-gradient with hard color stops (color, color Xpx, color2 Xpx, color2 Ypx) as the background and clip it to the text with background-clip:text; angle controls diagonal vs. horizontal stripes.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Polka-dot / grid pattern fill
effects.technique: Build a tiled dot field with a small radial-gradient (circle, color N%, transparent N%+1) plus background-size to set the tile, or cross two repeating-linear-gradients for a grid; clip the tiled pattern to the text with background-clip:text.
effects.markupNote: single element (a second offset radial-gradient layer gives a staggered/checker dot pattern)

effects.name: Halftone fill
effects.technique: Tile a radial-gradient dot pattern whose dot radius is driven by an underlying gradient/linear intensity map, then push a very high contrast() filter so dots harden to pure ink; clip the result to the text for a comic/print halftone fill.
effects.markupNote: single element (contrast filter may need a wrapper so it doesn't affect surrounding UI)

effects.name: Starfield / galaxy fill
effects.technique: Stack many tiny radial-gradient 'stars' at scattered positions over a dark radial/linear nebula gradient as a multi-layer background, clip it all to the text with background-clip:text, and optionally animate opacity/position for twinkle or slow drift.
effects.markupNote: single element (or duplicate layers for parallax depth)

effects.name: Knockout text via blend mode
effects.technique: Place high-contrast text (white on a white panel, or black on black) above a background image and apply mix-blend-mode:screen/multiply/darken/lighten so the letters punch through and reveal the image/scene behind them.
effects.markupNote: text element sits over a separate element/background holding the image; blend needs a stacking context

effects.name: Gradient mask fade
effects.technique: Apply mask-image:linear-gradient(black->transparent) (with -webkit- prefix) to the text element so glyphs fade out toward an edge; combine with a clipped color/gradient fill for a fading colored headline.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Mask wipe reveal
effects.technique: Set an oversized linear-gradient mask on the text and @keyframes-animate mask-position (or mask-size) so the alpha edge sweeps across, progressively revealing the letters; position is animated because gradients themselves can't be interpolated between keyframes.
effects.markupNote: single element (an animated <number> @property gives stop-based control)
effects.browserSupport: all modern (webkit-prefixed mask; @property variant needs Houdini)

effects.name: Marble / granite material fill
effects.technique: Generate a Perlin texture with an inline SVG <feTurbulence type='fractalNoise'> (multiple octaves), use it as the text's background-image (or feed feDisplacementMap), then clip to the text with background-clip:text for a veined marble/granite look.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> defs referenced via url(); the noise must be produced by SVG, not plain CSS

effects.name: Wood-grain material fill
effects.technique: Same SVG feTurbulence approach but with anisotropic baseFrequency (e.g. 0.1 0.01) to stretch the noise into long grain lines, color-mapped to browns via feColorMatrix/feComponentTransfer, then clipped to the text.
effects.markupNote: inline SVG <filter> defs (anisotropic baseFrequency creates the grain direction)

effects.name: Camouflage fill
effects.technique: Layer several large blobby radial-gradients in a camo palette (olive, tan, brown, black) with hard-ish stops and background-blend-mode to interlock the patches, then clip the composite to the text with background-clip:text.
effects.markupNote: single element (an SVG feTurbulence-driven version gives more organic, photoreal camo)
effects.browserSupport: all modern (webkit-prefixed clip; SVG variant = SVG filter)

effects.name: Animated scrolling texture fill
effects.technique: Clip a tileable texture or pattern image to the text and @keyframes-animate background-position so the texture continuously scrolls/flows through the letters (e.g. liquid, lava, conveyor, marquee fill).
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Typewriter typing with blinking caret
effects.technique: On a single-line element set white-space:nowrap and overflow:hidden, then animate width from 0 to 100% with a steps(N) timing function so characters appear one notch at a time; a border-right is animated via a separate step-end keyframe to blink as the caret.
effects.markupNote: Single element (text must be single-line, no wrapping). A wrapper helps center the inline-block.

effects.name: Multi-line / multi-phrase typewriter
effects.technique: Extends the width+steps typewriter by chaining several typing/deleting keyframe phases (or per-line spans each with their own steps width animation and staggered animation-delay) so the caret types one phrase, erases it, and types the next; caret blink animation runs in parallel.
effects.markupNote: One span per line/phrase, or carefully chained keyframes on one element; per-line variant needs multiple elements.

effects.name: Simple fade-in
effects.technique: Animate opacity from 0 to 1 (often with a small translate for a fade-up feel) via @keyframes with animation-fill-mode:forwards so the text settles visibly.
effects.markupNote: Single element

effects.name: Slide-in (directional fade-up/left)
effects.technique: Combine transform: translateX/translateY (off its final spot) with opacity:0 at the start keyframe, easing both to translate:0 / opacity:1; direction chosen by the sign/axis of the translate.
effects.markupNote: Single element (overflow:hidden on a wrapper gives a clean masked slide instead of off-screen drift).

effects.name: Zoom / scale-in
effects.technique: Animate transform: scale() from a value <1 (or >1 for a zoom-out settle) up to 1 alongside opacity, with transform-origin controlling the focal point; an overshoot bounce can be added with a cubic-bezier or extra keyframe.
effects.markupNote: Single element

effects.name: Blur-in / focus-in
effects.technique: Animate filter: blur() from a large radius (often with letter-spacing widened and opacity 0) down to blur(0) / normal spacing / opacity 1, so text resolves into focus; an expand variant starts very spread out and tightens.
effects.markupNote: Single element

effects.name: Mask wipe reveal (gradient mask slide)
effects.technique: Apply an oversized linear-gradient mask-image (transparent → opaque) sized larger than the element, then animate mask-position from one side to the other; because gradients can't tween, moving the big mask produces a smooth soft-edged wipe that reveals the text.
effects.markupNote: Single element
effects.browserSupport: all modern (needs -webkit-mask prefix for older Safari)

effects.name: Clip-path inset/polygon reveal
effects.technique: Animate clip-path from a collapsed inset()/polygon() (e.g. inset(0 100% 0 0) or a zero-area polygon) to inset(0)/full polygon, so the text is geometrically unveiled along an edge or wedge with a hard clean cutting line.
effects.markupNote: Single element

effects.name: 3D flip-in (rotateX/rotateY)
effects.technique: Set perspective on the element/parent and animate transform from rotateX(90deg) (or rotateY) with opacity 0 down to 0deg, with intermediate overshoot keyframes (-10deg/+10deg) for a bouncy hinge; backface-visibility:hidden keeps it clean.
effects.markupNote: Single element (per-letter spans give a domino flip variant).

effects.name: Character-by-character stagger reveal
effects.technique: Wrap each letter in a span carrying an index custom property (--i), then apply a fade/slide/scale keyframe to every span with animation-delay: calc(var(--i) * step) so letters cascade in sequence; a negative-delay trick can pre-roll the wave.
effects.markupNote: One <span style='--i:n'> per character (the wrapping is the only non-CSS bit; indices can be inline-styled).

effects.name: Gradient sweep / shimmer reveal
effects.technique: Set the text color transparent with background-clip:text over a wide (background-size:200%) linear-gradient containing a bright highlight band, then animate background-position so the light sweeps across the glyphs; can run once as an entrance or loop as a shimmer.
effects.markupNote: Single element (-webkit-background-clip:text needed).

effects.name: Conic-gradient @property reveal
effects.technique: Register a typed @property (e.g. an <angle> or <percentage>) and use it inside a conic-gradient used as background-clip:text fill or mask; animating the registered property sweeps the conic boundary, wiping the text in radially/angularly — interpolation only works because @property gives the variable a type.
effects.markupNote: Single element (@property registration in CSS).
effects.browserSupport: needs @property (Chrome 85+, Safari 16.4+, Firefox 128+); static gradient fallback

effects.name: Dropping / falling letters
effects.technique: Per-letter spans each animate transform: translateY from a negative offset (above) down to 0 with opacity, using staggered animation-delay (or calc with --i) and a slight scaleY squash and ease/bounce easing so letters drop in one after another like gravity.
effects.markupNote: One span per character with a stagger index/delay.

effects.name: RGB split glitch-in
effects.technique: Duplicate the text via ::before/::after pseudo-elements fed from a data-text attribute, tint one cyan and one magenta (offset with text-shadow or transform), then animate clip-path: inset() horizontal slices and small position jitters with steps() timing so the text snaps in with chromatic-aberration tearing.
effects.markupNote: Needs a data-text attribute so the pseudo-elements can mirror the text (single visible element + 2 pseudos).

effects.name: Glitch scramble/flicker entrance
effects.technique: A lighter glitch-in that combines rapid opacity/visibility flickers, brief clip-path slice displacements and tiny transform jumps using steps() keyframes so the heading stutters and snaps into place without the full RGB-channel duplication.
effects.markupNote: Single element (no data-text needed for the flicker-only variant).

effects.name: Sine wave float
effects.technique: Each letter span runs the same @keyframes that translateY up then down (e.g. 0 -> -0.5em -> 0); a staggered animation-delay of calc(var(--i) * 0.08s) per span makes the dip travel across the word like a sine wave.
effects.markupNote: Each character wrapped in its own <span> with an incrementing --i index (style="--i:0" ...).

effects.name: Cascading letter bounce
effects.technique: Per-letter spans animate translateY with a bouncy keyframe (drop with overshoot, e.g. 0 -> -0.6em -> 0 with a settle), using staggered animation-delay so letters bounce one after another. transform-origin: bottom adds gravity feel.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index for staggered delay.

effects.name: Jelly / elastic wobble
effects.technique: Per-letter spans run a keyframe that scales and skews with elastic overshoot (scaleX/scaleY oscillating around 1, e.g. 1,1 -> 1.25,0.75 -> 0.85,1.15 -> 1,1) driven by an elastic linear()/cubic-bezier curve; staggered delay makes the jelly ripple along the word.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index.
effects.browserSupport: all modern (linear() easing needs recent browsers)

effects.name: Rubber-band stretch
effects.technique: Animate.css-style rubberBand keyframe per letter: scaleX up / scaleY down then invert and settle (0% scale3d(1,1,1), 30% scaleX 1.25 scaleY .75, 40% scaleX .75 scaleY 1.25, ... 100% normal); apply per-span with optional stagger or trigger on :hover.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s; --i index if staggered.

effects.name: Shake / jitter
effects.technique: Each letter span runs a short, high-frequency keyframe that nudges translateX/translateY (and tiny rotate) by a few pixels in alternating directions with steps()-like rapid changes; per-letter delay/offset desynchronizes letters for a nervous jitter.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s; per-span delay or randomized --i for desync.

effects.name: Wobble rotate
effects.technique: Per-letter spans oscillate rotate() back and forth around transform-origin: bottom center (e.g. -8deg -> 8deg -> -8deg) on an ease-in-out loop; staggered delay sends a rocking wave through the letters.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index.

effects.name: Pendulum swing
effects.technique: Like wobble but pivoted from transform-origin: top center so each letter swings like a hanging pendulum; rotate keyframe with ease-in-out and per-letter delay for a hanging-sign sway.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index.

effects.name: 3D card flip
effects.technique: Container/spans get perspective; each letter span animates rotateX (or rotateY) from 0 to 360deg (or flips -90 -> 0) with backface-visibility handling; staggered delay flips letters one by one like a split-flap board.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s (inline-block) with --i index; perspective on parent.

effects.name: Spin / barrel roll
effects.technique: Each letter span runs rotate() 0 -> 360deg (2D spin) or rotateY full turn (3D barrel) on a loop; staggered animation-delay creates a rolling spin that travels across the word.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index.

effects.name: Squash & stretch bounce
effects.technique: Animation-principle squash/stretch: keyframe combines translateY with scaleY/scaleX inversion (tall+thin while rising via scaleY>1, flat+wide on landing via scaleX>1) anchored with transform-origin: bottom; per-letter delay makes a bouncing-ball wave of letters.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index.

effects.name: Breathing scale pulse
effects.technique: Each letter span gently scales between ~0.9 and ~1.1 on a slow ease-in-out loop (optionally pulsing opacity too); staggered delay makes the word inhale/exhale in a flowing wave.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index.

effects.name: Per-letter hue cycle
effects.technique: Each letter span animates color through the hue wheel (set color via hsl() and keyframe filter: hue-rotate 0 -> 360deg, or animate an @property registered <angle> hue); staggered delay offsets each letter's hue so colors chase across the text.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index for hue offset.

effects.name: Rainbow wave (motion + color)
effects.technique: Combines the sine-wave translateY motion with a per-letter hue offset: each span both bobs up/down and sits at hsl(calc(var(--i)*30), ...) or hue-rotates, so a colored wave ripples through the letters simultaneously.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index driving both delay and hue.

effects.name: Kinetic scramble reveal
effects.technique: Pure-CSS approximation of a scramble: each letter span holds a placeholder glyph in a ::before and animates a vertical translate/opacity step through stacked glyphs (or rapidly hue/blur-flickers) before the real character settles; steps() timing and per-letter delay make characters lock in left-to-right. (True random char cycling needs JS; CSS gives a cryptic flicker-in.)
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s; optional data-char attr feeding pseudo-element content. --i index for stagger.
effects.browserSupport: all modern (random glyphs require JS for true scramble)

effects.name: Typewriter letter cascade
effects.technique: Each letter span starts at opacity:0 / translateY or scale(0) and animates to visible with animation-fill-mode: both; staggered animation-delay reveals letters one at a time, popping or sliding in like typed/assembled text.
effects.markupNote: Per-letter <span>s with --i index; fill-mode both so letters stay revealed.

effects.name: Slide-in underline (left-to-right gradient grow)
effects.technique: An inline element gets a linear-gradient set as background-image with background-size:0% 0.1em and background-position bottom-left; on hover the background-size width transitions to 100%, sliding the underline in from the left. Because it's a gradient background it wraps cleanly across multiple lines.
effects.markupNote: single element (inline; headings need a wrapping inline span)

effects.name: Center-out underline (expand from middle)
effects.technique: Same gradient-as-background approach but background-position-x:50% so the 0%-to-100% background-size growth radiates outward from the center toward both edges on hover. Alternative implementation uses ::after with transform:scaleX(0) and transform-origin:center.
effects.markupNote: single element; the scaleX variant uses an ::after pseudo-element (no extra DOM)

effects.name: Swap/slide-through underline (in-from-left, out-to-right)
effects.technique: Underline starts at background-position-x:100% with 0 width; on hover background-size goes to 100% while background-position-x animates to 0%, so it slides in from the left on enter and slides out to the right on leave, giving directional continuity.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Grow-to-fill highlight underline (slide-to-top)
effects.technique: Always-visible thin underline made from a gradient background anchored to the bottom (background-position-y:100%); on hover background-size height grows from 0.1em to 100%, flooding the whole text box like a fill that the text sits on top of.
cssFeatures: color flip on hover for contrast
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Draw-on underline (scaleX pseudo-element)
effects.technique: An ::after pseudo-element absolutely positioned at the bottom (width:100%, height ~2px) with transform:scaleX(0); on hover transform:scaleX(1) with transform-origin controlling direction (left/right/center). The classic Tobias Ahlin trick uses transform-origin:right then flips to left on hover for a draw-then-retract feel.
effects.markupNote: single element with ::after; needs inline-block so width hugs text (single-line only)

effects.name: Gradient underline (static multi-color)
effects.technique: Because text-decoration-color cannot take a gradient, a linear-gradient is applied as a background-image sized to a thin strip at the bottom (background-size:100% 0.1em, background-repeat:no-repeat, positioned at bottom), yielding a multi-color/rainbow underline that flows across wrapped lines.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Animated gradient underline (sliding/shifting hue)
effects.technique: A gradient underline strip whose background-position is animated in a @keyframes loop (or whose gradient color-stops animate via @property registered custom properties) so the colors appear to flow through the underline; can combine with hover scaleX reveal.
effects.markupNote: single element; animating the gradient itself (not just position) needs @property
effects.browserSupport: all modern (position anim); needs @property for color/angle interpolation

effects.name: Wavy underline (native squiggle)
effects.technique: Pure declarative: text-decoration-line:underline with text-decoration-style:wavy, tuned with text-decoration-color, text-decoration-thickness and text-underline-offset. Spell-check / hand-drawn squiggle look with zero pseudo-elements.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Animated wavy underline (rolling squiggle)
effects.technique: A repeating wave is drawn as a background-image (SVG/radial-gradient wave tile) on a bottom strip and its background-position-x is animated in @keyframes so the squiggle scrolls horizontally; alternatively an @property-driven text-underline-offset oscillates to make a native wavy underline bob.
effects.markupNote: single element; inline SVG wave tile optional but no extra DOM nodes

effects.name: Double underline
effects.technique: Either native text-decoration-style:double (two parallel lines from one property) or, for full control, two stacked linear-gradient strips as background-images at different background-position-y values with a gap between them; each line can be a different color/thickness or animate independently.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Highlighter marker sweep
effects.technique: A thick semi-transparent gradient band (background-size:0% ~0.4em, background-repeat:no-repeat, positioned to overlap the lower text) is set as background-image; on hover or on scroll-into-view the background-size width animates 0%->100% so the marker appears to be swiped across the words. Skewed/soft-edged gradients sell the felt-tip look.
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Pen / felt-tip highlight (uneven hand-drawn marker)
effects.technique: Like the marker sweep but the highlight uses an irregular mask/clip or an SVG/blob-shaped background and slight rotate(skew) so edges are ragged and the band sits crooked, mimicking a real highlighter pen rather than a clean rectangle; box-decoration-break:clone keeps each wrapped line marked.
effects.markupNote: single element; inline SVG shape defs optional, no extra DOM nodes required

effects.name: Strike-through draw animation
effects.technique: A center-positioned line drawn as an ::after bar or a background-image strip at 50% height that animates width 0->100% (or scaleX 0->1), so the line-through is drawn across the text on hover/toggle; can animate text-decoration-color from transparent for a native fade-in strike.
effects.markupNote: single element (::after) or native text-decoration

effects.name: Box / border highlight draw-around
effects.technique: A border or outline is drawn around the text box on hover by animating clip-path:inset()/polygon or a mask-image so each side reveals in sequence, or by transitioning two pseudo-elements' width/height; outline-offset and box-shadow can also expand to frame the text.
effects.markupNote: single element with ::before/::after (no extra DOM)
effects.browserSupport: all modern; clip-path animation needs modern browsers

effects.name: Background highlight reveal (scroll/hover wipe behind text)
effects.technique: A solid/gradient block behind the text reveals via an ::before whose width or clip-path/mask wipes across (left-to-right, top-to-bottom) on hover or on entering the viewport, with the text color flipping for contrast (often via mix-blend-mode:difference) so it reads as a knockout highlight.
cssFeatures: IntersectionObserver hook for scroll (CSS-only with animation-timeline:view())
effects.markupNote: single element with ::before; data-text not required

effects.name: Webkit box-reflect mirror
effects.technique: Apply -webkit-box-reflect: below <offset> <gradient> directly to the text element; the browser auto-generates a flipped clone below it, faded out via a linear-gradient mask (transparent to semi-opaque white).
effects.markupNote: single element

effects.name: Cloned mirror reflection (gradient-masked)
effects.technique: Duplicate the text in a sibling/::after (via data-text content), apply transform: scaleY(-1) to flip it, then fade with mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,.5), transparent). Cross-browser alternative to box-reflect.
effects.markupNote: data-text attribute for ::after, or a duplicated text span
